title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: virt-v2v bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for virt-v2v is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64

fixes.description: virt-builder, virt-v2v & other tools with -v and --install causes dnf5 error [rhel-9.7]
Print blkhash of converted image in virt-v2v debugging output [9.7]
There is no nbdcopy info in v2v debug log since virt-v2v version 2.7.1-2 [rhel-9.7]
virt-v2v-inspector is failing on snapshots of running VMs [rhel-9.7]
Print better mountpoint stats in debug output [rhel-9.7]
Add virt-v2v -io vddk-noextents=true so we can test noextents [rhel-9.7]
Add possible roots to the virt-v2v-inspector output [rhel-9.7]

full_text:
An update for virt-v2v is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
